items.title: Update java-minor
items.body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-exporter-otlp](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java) | `1.60.1` → `1.61.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-exporter-otlp/1.61.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-exporter-otlp/1.60.1/1.61.0?slim=true) |
| [io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-sdk-extension-incubator](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java) | `1.60.1-alpha` → `1.61.0-alpha` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-sdk-extension-incubator/1.61.0-alpha?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-sdk-extension-incubator/1.60.1-alpha/1.61.0-alpha?slim=true) |
| [io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-sdk-extension-autoconfigure](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java) | `1.60.1` → `1.61.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-sdk-extension-autoconfigure/1.61.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-sdk-extension-autoconfigure/1.60.1/1.61.0?slim=true) |
| [io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-api](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java) | `1.60.1` → `1.61.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-api/1.61.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/maven/io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-api/1.60.1/1.61.0?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java (io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-exporter-otlp)</summary>

### [`v1.61.0`](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#Version-1610-2026-04-10)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/compare/v1.60.1...v1.61.0)

##### API

- Stabilize `isEnabled()` on `Tracer`, `Logger`, and metric instruments
  ([#​8200](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8200))

##### Incubating

- **BREAKING** Update `EnvironmentGetter` and `EnvironmentSetter` key normalization to reflect spec
  changes
  ([#​8233](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8233))

##### SDK

##### Traces

- Retain propagated context when generating random trace IDs
  ([#​8263](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8263))
- Add rate-limited warning log when `BatchSpanProcessor` drops spans
  ([#​8167](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8167))

##### Metrics

- Track series start time per aggregator rather than at `SdkMeterProvider` creation time
  ([#​8180](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8180))
- Capture context class loader during async callback registration
  ([#​8091](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8091))
- Make include/exclude work correctly with empty (but non-null) lists
  ([#​8185](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8185))

##### Logs

- Fix condition for recording successful log processing metrics
  ([#​8226](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8226))

##### Exporters

- OTLP: add configurable bounds to response body reading
  ([#​8224](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8224), [#​8277](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8277))
- OTLP: only throw invalid response exception when gRPC response size < 5 bytes
  ([#​8194](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8194))
- OTLP: remove duplicate FINEST-level error logging in gRPC exporter
  ([#​8216](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8216))
- OTLP Profiles: clean up profile signal exporters for consistency
  ([#​8172](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8172))

##### Extensions

- **BREAKING** Autoconfigure: remove deprecated `ComponentLoader` class (use
  `io.opentelemetry.common.ComponentLoader` instead)
  ([#​8243](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8243))
- Declarative config: fix `DeclarativeConfigProperties` javadoc to not throw exceptions
  ([#​8079](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8079))
- Declarative config: resource attribute filtering should include attributes by default
  ([#​8177](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8177))
- Declarative config: enforce IncludedExcludeModel .included and .excluded are not empty
  ([#​8266](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8266))
- Autoconfigure: restructure SDK incubator to not depend on autoconfigure internals
  ([#​8242](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8242))

##### Project tooling

- Disable Gradle build cache on releases to mitigate supply chain risk
  ([#​8254](https://redirect.github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java/pull/8254))

</details>

---

- Branch creation
  - At any time (no schedule defined)
- Automerge

items.title: Java 21 modernization
items.body:
Another non-exiting PR. Basic cleanup of code base taking advantage of java features introduced from Java 11 to Java 21. All changes are IDE suggestions. No code/interface/behavior alterations. Biggest change is that some of our utility functions are now natively supported by Java, so we can deprecate those functions.

Next PR should focus on fixing the various compile and javadoc warnings.

----

- [x] I read and understood <https://github.com/jgrapht/jgrapht/wiki/Become-a-Contributor>
